moods.name: Back-Alley Smoke Break
moods.core_aesthetic: social exhaustion, introvert escape, the performance is over

moods.name: 4AM Insomnia Solitude
moods.core_aesthetic: screen glow in dark rooms, convenience stores, the hour nobody sees you

moods.name: Last Train Noir
moods.core_aesthetic: suited characters on late-night trains, rain-streaked reflections, lone-wolf energy

moods.name: Rooftop Rain Catharsis
moods.core_aesthetic: drenched in rain, defiant stance, city lights bleeding through downpour

moods.name: Closing Time Diner
moods.core_aesthetic: last customer, borrowed warmth, empty cafes, belonging nowhere

moods.name: Dawn Walk Survival
moods.core_aesthetic: waterfront at first light, survived the night, golden-blue liminal hour

moods.name: Ghost Call Vulnerability
moods.core_aesthetic: 2AM phone calls, stairwell confessions, words they'd never say in daylight

moods.name: Mirror Confrontation
moods.core_aesthetic: bathroom mirror at 3AM, identity crisis, the war behind closed doors

moods.name: Hospital Waiting Room
moods.core_aesthetic: fluorescent purgatory, helpless warriors, the strongest rendered powerless

moods.name: Street Duo
moods.core_aesthetic: Japanese back-alley bond, daytime, street-level chemistry

moods.name: Quiet Afternoon Off-Duty
moods.core_aesthetic: iced drinks by the window, sunlight on skin, the peaceful version nobody expects

moods.name: Edge of Bed 3AM
moods.core_aesthetic: sitting up in the dark, sheets tangled, the heaviest hour, back to camera

moods.name: 2AM Gym Solitude
moods.core_aesthetic: training alone at 2AM, punching what they can't say, iron as therapy

moods.name: Sunday Ghost
moods.core_aesthetic: afternoon light in empty apartments, laundry on the floor, the loneliest day

moods.name: Sad Boy Rain
moods.core_aesthetic: rain-soaked loners, headphones in the city, hoodie-up urban ghosts, feeling everything

moods.name: Nostalgic Cel-Shade
moods.core_aesthetic: VHS warmth, flat color fills, Evangelion-era palettes, the beauty of imperfect animation

moods.name: Wabi-Sabi Beauty
moods.core_aesthetic: chipped ceramics, worn wood, kintsugi gold, the beauty of age and use

moods.name: Gallery Stillness
moods.core_aesthetic: empty exhibition halls, art-within-art framing, contemplative distance, marble and light

moods.name: Jersey Core
moods.core_aesthetic: sports streetwear crossover, athletic hype, team identity, jersey as fashion statement

moods.name: Dark Academia
moods.core_aesthetic: libraries after hours, foggy campus, candlelit study, tweed and ink, the weight of knowing

moods.name: Lofi Bedroom Sanctuary
moods.core_aesthetic: warm solitude in personality-packed rooms, headphones on, cassette tapes, cozy being alone

moods.name: Burnout Desk
moods.core_aesthetic: birds-eye view of academic crash, asleep on papers, the overachiever who pushed past the limit

moods.name: Midnight Noir
moods.core_aesthetic: late-night urban isolation, cinematic solitude, high-contrast spotlight lighting

moods.name: Golden Passage
moods.core_aesthetic: transient sunset travel, train rides, balconies, bittersweet nostalgic warmth

moods.name: Stormy Solace
moods.core_aesthetic: rain-slicked intensity, cozy weather contrast, misty greens and dark greys

moods.name: Snowfall Silence
moods.core_aesthetic: solitary figures in winter snow, heavy coats, visible breath, quiet muffled atmosphere

moods.name: Neon Arcade
moods.core_aesthetic: chaotic colorful glow of retro arcade cabinets, yet feeling entirely isolated

moods.name: Summer Haze
moods.core_aesthetic: intense summer heat, cicadas, bright sunlight, deep shadows, Ramune under blinding sky

moods.name: Grunge Loner
moods.core_aesthetic: band tees, beer cans, floor-sitting, cigarette smoke, books and rebellion

moods.name: Skyline Ache
moods.core_aesthetic: rooftops at twilight, open fields at dusk, purple-pink skies, feeling small against the world

moods.name: Sunset Camper Van
moods.core_aesthetic: golden hour, beach solitude, vintage vans, warm coffee, serene lo-fi aesthetic

moods.name: Late Shift
moods.core_aesthetic: returning home exhausted, messy apartments, dual warm/cool lighting contrast, loosened ties

moods.name: Laundromat Liminality
moods.core_aesthetic: Fluorescent hum, spinning drum reflections, and the rhythmic waiting of a late-night chore in a soap-scented sanctuary.

moods.name: Aquarium Blue Silence
moods.core_aesthetic: Submerged blue light through glass, weightless solitude, and deep-sea tranquility.

moods.name: Rural Inaka Rust
moods.core_aesthetic: Blinding country sunlight, overgrown rail tracks, and the heavy, humid stillness of rural Japanese stagnation.

moods.name: Gale-Force Clarity
moods.core_aesthetic: Violent winds on high ridges, fluttering fabric, and the exhilarating sharpness of high-altitude cold air.

moods.name: Mist-Veiled Bus Stop
moods.core_aesthetic: Thick white fog obscuring the world, roadside waiting, and the soft isolation of a morning lost in mist.

moods.name: Fumikiri Red Pulse
moods.core_aesthetic: Rhythmic red warning lights at railway crossings illuminating the blue-hour gloom as a silhouette waits for the train.

moods.name: Petal-Storm Ephemera
moods.core_aesthetic: High-velocity wind scattering thousands of cherry blossoms or autumn leaves, capturing a fleeting, beautiful goodbye.

moods.name: Shallow Mirror-Tide
moods.core_aesthetic: Walking across ankle-deep tide pools that perfectly reflect a vast, cloud-filled sky, erasing the horizon in ethereal blue.

moods.name: Amber Archive
moods.core_aesthetic: Blinding sunbeams piercing through dusty, towering library stacks, highlighting suspended particles and the heavy stillness of ancient books.

moods.name: Vapor-Glass Sanctuary
moods.core_aesthetic: Lush tropical flora trapped behind condensation-slicked glass panes, creating a blurred, emerald-tinted world of humid, sheltered isolation.

moods.name: Sun-Drenched Downpour
moods.core_aesthetic: Golden sunlight piercing through heavy rain, turning falling droplets into shimmering prisms against dark, moody storm clouds.

moods.name: Ember Solace
moods.core_aesthetic: Firelight warmth against a freezing blue night, glowing sparks drifting into a snowy void.

moods.name: Dashboard Horizon
moods.core_aesthetic: Driving into a blinding sunset, car interior in deep shadow, golden light bleeding over the steering wheel.

moods.name: Chlorine Blue Midnight
moods.core_aesthetic: Floating weightless in a dark pool, underwater lights casting rippling turquoise caustics on the surface.

moods.name: Drafting Table Dawn
moods.core_aesthetic: A single desk lamp illuminating meticulous work while the room is drowned in pre-dawn blue.

moods.name: Storm-Drain Petals
moods.core_aesthetic: Pink cherry blossoms trapped in the swirling gray water of an urban gutter during a heavy downpour.

moods.name: Static-Screen Solitude
moods.core_aesthetic: Character sitting in front of a wall of old CRT monitors displaying white noise, the gray flicker lighting the room.

moods.name: Fire-Escape Forest
moods.core_aesthetic: Sitting on rusted iron stairs surrounded by a dense thicket of potted plants, golden hour light hitting the leaves.

moods.name: Snow-Capped Phone Booth
moods.core_aesthetic: A lone red phone booth buried in deep snow, its warm interior light glowing like a lantern in a blizzard.

moods.name: Bakery Window Steam
moods.core_aesthetic: Looking through a fogged bakery window at 5 AM; warm golden bread inside, blue cold outside.

moods.name: Whale-Skeleton Museum
moods.core_aesthetic: Character standing beneath a massive blue whale skeleton in a moonlit, silent museum hall.

moods.name: Rooftop Helipad Calm
moods.core_aesthetic: Lying flat on a giant red 'H' on a skyscraper rooftop, looking up at a vast, cloudless sky.

moods.name: Suburban Street-Light Haze
moods.core_aesthetic: The yellow-orange cone of a single streetlamp in a fog-heavy suburban cul-de-sac.

moods.name: Tangled Wire Ghetto
moods.core_aesthetic: Character on a balcony overlooking a chaotic mess of power lines and transformers against a sunset.

moods.name: Tunnel-Flash Rhythm
moods.core_aesthetic: The strobe effect of tunnel lights hitting a character’s face inside a fast-moving subway train.

moods.name: Botanical Lab Decay
moods.core_aesthetic: Overgrown science equipment, cracked test tubes with vines, and green/mossy palette in an abandoned lab.

moods.name: Rooftop Water Tank Solitude
moods.core_aesthetic: Sitting atop a rusted spherical water tank, legs dangling over a massive city grid.

moods.name: Kitchen Light Confessional
moods.core_aesthetic: Leaning against a fridge in a dark kitchen, the open door's light spill as the only source.

moods.name: Terminal Gate Liminal
moods.core_aesthetic: Empty airport terminal at 3 AM, blue floor lights, wide expansive glass looking at stars.
